primary_outcomes: Proportion of subjects who achieved transfusion independence, defined as an average Hb ≥ 9 g/dL without any pRBC transfusions for a continuous period of ≥ 6 months at any time during the study after LentiRed Drug Product infusion.
Number and proportion of subjects who maintained βA-T87Q-globin(HbAT87Q) at ≥2.0 g/dL for ≥ 6 months after LentiRed Drug Product infusion.
Proportion of subjects whose red blood cells (RBC) transfusion requirement was reduced for ≥6 months after LentiRed Drug Product infusion, compared to previous 2-year transfusion records.

primary_outcomes: Growth in pediatric subjects will be assessed by height.
Growth in pediatric subjects will be assessed by weight.
Growth in pediatric subjects will be assessed by the head and chest circumference.
Growth in pediatric subjects will be assessed by interocular distance.

The pubertal status will be measured using by Tanner scale.

Lifestyle behaviors will be assessed by general questioning.
